S.FORM: Rafer Alston sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Rafer Alston, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ra*er als~…ïton s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la, p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ra*er als~…ïton, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
